svg.title: Automated PostgreSQL backup flow
svg.desc: Every night at 3 AM, cron triggers a Go program on the VPS that dumps, compresses, and uploads the database to Cloudflare R2, then sends a health ping or failure alert.

g.text: raw SQL text from the Postgres container

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Why compress the SQL dump with gzip?')
sendPrompt('How does uploading to Cloudflare R2 work?')
sendPrompt('How does the retention window pruning work?')
sendPrompt('How does the NotifyKit failure alert work?')
sendPrompt('What is Cloudflare R2 and why use it for backups?')
sendPrompt('How does healthchecks.io monitor cron jobs?')
